title: Orichalcum???
description: If you end your turn without [gold]Block[/gold], gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Triggers only if the player has exactly 0 block at the end of turn. The block gain is applied during BeforeTurnEnd phase.
